thinking: The user is asking me to explain the
Eiffel Tower. This is a general knowledge request that doesn't require any of my development tools. I
can provide information about the Eiffel Tower directly.

text:
Tour Eiffel in French) is one of the world's most iconic landmarks, located in Paris, France. Here's an overview:

## Basic

**: Gustave Eiffel and his team
- **Location**: Champ de Mars, 7th arrondissement, Paris

## Historical Background
- Originally built as the entrance arch for the 1889 Exposition Universelle (

World's Fair) celebrating the 100th anniversary of the French Revolution
- Was intended to be temporary and

was supposed to be dismantled after 20 years
- Initially faced criticism

from Parisian artists and intellectuals who considered it an eyesore

## Construction Details
- Made of wrought iron with over

18,000 individual metal parts
- Held together by approximately

2.5 million rivets
- Weighs about 10,100 tons (including structure)
- Painted

every 7 years to prevent rust (takes 18 months to complete)

## Cultural

Significance
- Became a symbol of France and Paris
- Most visited paid monument in the world (nearly 7

million visitors annually)
- Featured in countless movies, books, and artworks
- UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1991

## Interesting Facts
- Can sway up

to 15 cm (6 inches) in strong wind
- Grows about 15 cm t

aller in summer due to thermal expansion
- Has 72 names of French scientists and engineers en

graved on it
- Was the world's tallest man-made structure until 1930

The tower has three
observation levels open to the public, offering spectacular views of Paris!
